_comment: Dictionnaire de traduction FragValue. Cle = string FR (exacte, contexte HTML), Valeur = traduction EN. Tri du plus long au plus court automatique a la generation. Strings protegees (FragValue, CS2, FACEIT...) ne sont jamais traduites.

Rafraîchis ton diagnostic after every ma: Refresh your diagnosis after every match to track your progress
Mesure comment tes actions affectent la: Measures how your actions affect real-time win probability. A 5v5 entry frag that opens a bombsite is worth 5x more than an exit frag.
Pourcentage de rounds où tu as contribué: Percentage of rounds where you contributed: Kill, Assist, Survived or Traded. A far more reliable consistency indicator than simple K/D.
Dommages moyens infligés par round. Révè: Average damage dealt per round. Reveals if you create value even without finishing, or farm easy frags on ecos.
Le premier duel de chaque round, gagné o: The first duel of each round, won or lost, directly influences the outcome. Pros win 54-58% of their opening duels.
Rounds where you achieve 2+ kills. Indicator of your impact in unbalanced situations. Clutch potential.
OD% = Duels ouverture gagnés / Total due: OD% = Opening duels won / Total opening duels × 100

Ton profil de duelliste est solide avec: Your duelist profile is solid with a 1.28 K/D and 57% opening win rate placing you above Challenger threshold. Your real ceiling is consistency: your KAST oscillates between 62% and 82% depending on matches. Work on consistency before peak performance.

Puis-je changer de plan à tout moment ?: Can I change plans at any time?
Oui, tu peux upgrader ou downgrader à to: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade at any time. Changes take effect immediately and prorating is calculated automatically.
Non, tous les abonnements sont sans enga: No, all subscriptions are commitment-free. You can cancel anytime from your account.
Tu as 7 jours gratuits pour tester toute: You get 7 free days to try all Pro features. No charge during the trial. You can cancel anytime in 1 click from your account, without justification. If you don't cancel, your Pro subscription continues automatically at the displayed rate.
Comment marche la garantie satisfait ou: How does the 14-day money-back guarantee work?
Si dans les 14 jours suivant ton paiemen: If within 14 days of your payment you're not satisfied with the Pro plan, email us at contact@fragvalue.com and we'll refund you fully, no questions asked. No conditions, no commitment.
Oui, Free est gratuit pour toujours avec: Yes, Free is free forever with 3 demo analyses per month, 3 scouts per day, and essential FACEIT stats. No credit card required. You can use FragValue without ever paying if Free is enough for you.
Carte bancaire (Visa, Mastercard, Amex),: Credit card (Visa, Mastercard, Amex), Apple Pay, Google Pay via our partner Stripe. All payments are secure.
Le FV Score /100 est notre indice de tal: The FV Score /100 is our proprietary talent index. It combines 4 pillars: Performance (35pts), Consistency (28pts), Impact (25pts) and Utility (15pts). More details on our Statistics Guide page.
Les fichiers demo sont traités en temps: Demo files are processed in real-time then deleted from our servers. Only extracted statistics are kept in your account.
L'extension est optionnelle mais recomma: The extension is optional but recommended for Pro users. It enables automatic sync of your FACEIT matches without manual uploads.
Le plan Elite est déjà disponible ?: Is the Elite plan available yet?
Elite est en bêta privée pour les coachs: Elite is in private beta for coaches and esports teams. Team dashboard, round-by-round tactical analysis, veto preparation and pro reference comparison are in active development. If you're a coach or esports club, email contact@fragvalue.com to join the beta and get a lifetime early backer rate.

Base de données des lineups utility util: Database of utility lineups used by the best CS2 teams. Filterable by map, site, CT/T side and usage type (execute, retake, hold, anti-eco).
Position de lancer exacte sur la mini-ma: Exact throw position on minimap + crosshair angle + grenade path with all bounces.
Chaque lineup vient avec son win rate pr: Each lineup comes with its pro win rate: how often the team using it wins the round.
Filtre par joueur : voir les smokes sign: Filter by player: see signature smokes from s1mple, ZywOo, NiKo, ropz. Learn their habits.
Sauvegarde les lineups que tu veux appre: Save the lineups you want to learn, synced with your profile, to share with your team.
Scorecard HLTV complète pour chaque matc: Complete HLTV scorecard for each match: ratings, ADR, KAST, opening duels per player. Filter by tournament, team or map to explore how the best win their rounds.
Positions tick par tick, kills, grenades: Tick-by-tick positions, kills, grenades, round-by-round timeline. HLTV demo parsing pipeline in preparation.
Isole les rounds décisifs : clutches, pi: Isolate decisive rounds: clutches, pistols, last stands, executes. Learn only from situations that matter.
Tous les BO3 S-tier disponibles dans les: All S-tier BO3s available within 48h after match end. New batch with each major tournament.
Voir ton HLTV rating vs les pros sur la: See your HLTV rating vs pros on the same map, and identify where you lose rounds.
Compare tes stats CS2 au top 20 HLTV, mé: Compare your CS2 stats to the HLTV top 20, metric by metric. Quantified gap on HLTV Rating, KAST, ADR, opening duels, util damage, clutches. See how close you are to pro level, and which stats to focus on first.
Entre ton équipe et l'adversaire : FragV: Between your team and the opponent: FragValue crosses stats of 5 players vs 5 opponents on each active pool map. You get the optimal ban sequence, the map to pick, the most favorable decider.
Leur meilleure map (7 wins sur 10), ta p: Their best map (7 wins out of 10), your weakest. Clear first-round ban.
Leur CT Anubis tourne à 68%. Ton écart e: Their CT Anubis runs at 68%. Your gap is too big to play the swing.
Ta map signature. Gap de 16pts et ton CT: Your signature map. 16pt gap and your CT Mirage at 72% vs their T at 45%.
Gap positif +9pts et leur opening WR T D: Positive +9pt gap and their opening WR T Dust2 is only 47%. Force long entries.
Proche mais leur T Inferno est un cran a: Close but their T Inferno is a notch above. Ban rather than risk it as decider.
Map où vous êtes tous les deux moyens. B: Map where you're both average. Ban to force the decider onto Vertigo.
Si le BO3 va jusqu'au bout, Vertigo est: If the BO3 goes the distance, Vertigo is the most favorable remaining map. +15pt gap.
Prep Veto arrive dans le plan Elite. Ent: Prep Veto arrives in the Elite plan. Enter the 5 FACEIT nicknames of each side, choose the format (BO1, BO3, BO5), get the ban sequence, map to pick and most favorable decider in one click. Enable your profile to be notified at launch.
Ordre de bans recommandé pour maximiser: Recommended ban order to maximize your edge on the 7 pool maps, based on match format.
Win rate par side, par map et par équipe: Win rate by side, map and team. Compare their CT Mirage vs your T Mirage to know which half to force the round.
Analyse sur les 20 derniers matchs de ch: Analysis of the 20 most recent matches per side (30-day rolling). Old out-of-form matches are excluded.
Crée ton roster FragValue, invite tes 4: Create your FragValue roster, invite your 4 teammates and launch the veto in one click. Stats are pre-loaded from their profiles.
Entre un pseudo d'équipe FACEIT : FragVa: Enter a FACEIT team nickname: FragValue analyzes the last N matches and detects their repeated patterns. A default executes, B retakes, utility waste, plant timings, save behavior. You enter the match knowing what to expect.
A default avec smoke jungle + CT: A default with jungle + CT smoke
Dans 73% des rounds A pushés, leur IGL l: In 73% of A push rounds, their IGL throws the same jungle+CT double smoke, then palace entry with flash pop. Average plant timing: 0:48 remaining.
Stack 2 CT palace avec HE pré-grenade ti: Stack 2 CT palace with HE pre-grenade timed at 1:20. Anchor ticket with molo when smoke is called.
Si le plant est sur B tard (moins de 20s: If plant is on B late (under 20s), 4 out of 5 players systematically retake via apartments with double flash short. Never direct banana retake.
Post-plant default: 1 joueur apps avec m: Post-plant default: 1 player apps with molo lineup + 1 new box with AK ready. Ignore banana, focus apps.
Sur les 6 premiers rounds, ils dépensent: In the first 6 rounds, they spend on average 4 utility for 2 kills. 28% utility efficiency, lowest in the pool. Their catwalk smokes are 2s short on B.
Push agressif long en opening round. Hol: Aggressive long push opening round. Aggressive mid hold until their smokes are placed. Their transition is slow.
Fake B default vers A en 0:30: Fake B default to A at 0:30
Quand ils posent smoke B cave au debut d: When they place B cave smoke at round start, 55% chance they rotate A via mid/cave at 0:30. Little real B commit when cave smoke comes early.
Ne stack jamais B si smoke cave est tôt: Never stack B if cave smoke is early (before 1:45). Keep 2A + 2 mid, 1 rotating. If fake B, you have the tempo.
Sur 10 rounds T Nuke, 4 rushs outside A: In 10 T Nuke rounds, 4 outside A rushes via lower with hut + heaven smokes. If first kill goes through, they plant A lower 100% of the time.
Early info play sur outside (flash + pee: Early info play on outside (flash + peek squeaky) by 1:40. If info, molo lower + stack heaven. Their rush without info flops.
Dès qu'ils passent en 3v5 sans plant, il: Once they hit 3v5 without plant, they save 4 guns out of 5. No clutch attempts. Economy reset by the 3rd round after.
Push pour les chopper à la sortie de sit: Push to catch them at site exit once 3v5. Predictable exits: they rarely attempt a bold rotation.
Chaque setup détecté vient avec sa fréqu: Each detected setup comes with its frequency, average timing and win rate over the analysis window.
Pour chaque pattern, une contre-stratégi: For each pattern, a ready-to-apply counter-strategy: utility, positioning, peek timing.
Choisis la map du match à venir et le si: Choose the upcoming match map and the side played by the opponent: only relevant patterns appear.
Export PDF / image pour briefer l'équipe: PDF / image export to brief the team before the match. Counters readable in 30 seconds on mobile.
